zh.lifeSummary: 當Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass於1445年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯時，他的父親John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass30歲，母親Marion Campbell Of Craignish31歲。他於1449年與Marion Houston在蘇格蘭雷福福爾休斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年1月20日之前，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾考瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass于1445年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯时，他的父亲John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass30岁，母亲Marion Campbell Of Craignish31岁。他于1449年与Marion Houston在苏格兰雷福福爾休斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年1月20日之前，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾考瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Colin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Diminutive form of the medieval name Col(le), a short form of Nicholas . The medieval name died out after the 14th century. In the 19th century Colin was reintroduced to England from Scotland, where it is an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Cailean, particularly favoured among the Campbells and the MacKenzies, which relates to St Columba ( see Callum ) as Crìsdean does to Christ and Moirean to Mary.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass was born in 1445, in Ardkinglas House, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass, was 30 and his mother, Marion Campbell Of Craignish, was 31. He married Marion Houston in 1449, in Houston, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died before 20 January 1479, and was buried in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass est né en 1445, à Ardkinglas House, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marion Campbell Of Craignish, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Marion Houston en 1449, à Houston, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé avant 20 janvier 1479, et a été enterré à Cowal, Argyll, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglassが1445年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドキングラス ホーウゼで生まれた時，父John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglassは30歳，母Marion Campbell Of Craignishは31歳であった。1449年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアホーウストンでMarion Houstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年1月20日以前に死去し，スコットランドアルグイルコワルにて埋葬された。

ko.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 아드킨글라스 허스
ko.lifeSummary: Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass(이)가 1445년 스컷랜드 아그이 아드킨글라스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Campbell Of Craignish(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1449년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 허스턴에서 Marion Houston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 1월 20일 이전 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 코월에 묻혔다.

ru.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: ардкинглас хоус, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass родился в 1445 г. в местности ардкинглас хоус, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Campbell Of Craignish, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Houston в 1449 г. в местности хоустон, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер перед 20 январь 1479 г. и был похоронен в местности коуаль, аргилл, Шотландия.
